instruments.input: entities, records, IDs, tables, JSON structures, indexes, and state transitions
instruments.operation: Discovery, creativity, systems thinking, and project generation. Use source library creativity/innovation/network sources to professionalize the project-development account. Vision: Explain Nexus and Personal OS as project-development and discovery infrastructure, not miscellaneous personal tooling.
